backstory.original: Diana was already a formidable gymnast when she and her friends were transported to the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. Diana wields her Javelin Staff with determination and courage, harnessing its potent magic to triumph over countless obstacles. The confidence of this outspoken athlete propels her friends forward in their quest to return home.
backstory.display: 和她的朋友们被传送到龙与地下城的神奇世界时，戴安娜已经是一名强大的体操运动员。戴安娜勇敢而坚定地挥舞着自己的标枪法杖，运用其强大的魔力战胜了无数的障碍。这位坦率的运动员的自信推动着朋友们走上归家之途。

description.original: Diana attacks a random enemy with her Javelin staff.
description.display: 戴安娜使用她的标枪杖攻击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Diana hits up to 10 enemies for ultimate damage, stunning them for 5 seconds.
description.display: 戴安娜对最多 10 名敌人造成杀招伤害，并使其眩晕 5 秒。

longDescription.original: Diana throws her Javelin Staff, dealing ultimate damage 10 times to random enemies and stunning them for 5 seconds.
longDescription.display: 戴安娜投掷她的标枪法杖，对随机敌人造成 10 次杀招伤害，并使其眩晕 5 秒。

description.desc: Diana's base attack, Javelin Staff, knocks around enemies she hits based on where she is positioned in her column in the formation.
戴安娜的基本攻击“标枪法杖”会根据她在阵型纵队中的位置将命中的敌人击倒。
Diana increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX of 15 or higher by $amount%.
戴安娜使所有敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Diana inspires her allies with her impressive feats of agility.
specializationDescription.display: 戴安娜通过惊人的敏捷专长激励盟友。

description.desc: Diana increases the damage of all Champions with a total ability score of 78 or less by $amount%.
戴安娜使所有总属性值小于等于 78 的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Diana inspires her allies to do the best with what they have.
specializationDescription.display: 戴安娜激励盟友尽其所能。

description.desc: Diana increases the damage of all Champions that are 20 years old or younger by $amount%.
戴安娜使所有 20 岁或以下的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Diana inspires her allies to match her youthful exuberance.
specializationDescription.display: 戴安娜激励盟友跟上她的清纯活力。

conditions.desc: Diana increases the speed of area transitions by 400% (caps at $effect_cap%).
Diana increases the speed of area transitions by $amount% (caps at $effect_cap%).
戴安娜使区域转换的速度提高 400%（上限为 $effect_cap%）。
戴安娜使区域转换的速度提高 $amount%（上限为 $effect_cap%）。

tipText.original: Diana increases the speed of area transitions, enabling you to complete adventures faster!
tipText.display: 戴安娜提高区域转换的速度，使你能够更快地完成冒险！

description.desc: Increases the effect of Diana's Inspire specializations by $amount%.
使戴安娜的“激励”专精效果提高 $amount%。
Diana increases the effect of her Inspire specialization choice by $amount% for each Champion it affects, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一位勇士被“激励”专精选择的效果影响，戴安娜均使该选择的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Diana's inspiration relies on how the team works together.
specializationDescription.display: 戴安娜的灵感来源于团队合作。

description.desc: Diana increases the effect of her Inspire specialization choice by $amount% for each Champion it does NOT affect, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一位勇士未被“激励”专精选择的效果影响，戴安娜均使该选择的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Diana focuses on how one Champion stands out from the rest.
specializationDescription.display: 戴安娜专注于一位脱颖而出的勇士。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Diana's Inspire specializations by $amount%.
使戴安娜的“激励”专精效果提高 $amount%。
Increases the effect of Diana's Inspire specializations by $amount%.
使戴安娜的“激励”专精效果提高 $amount%。

Diana can help scavenge up to $(current_scavenge_cap diana_electrum_scavenger floor) additional Electrum Chests from boss loot sacks. While this cap is not reached, Diana has a $amount% chance of scavenging 1 Electrum Chest each time a boss drops a loot bag. The cap increases by $cap_increase_per_day every day.

conditions.desc: ^^Electrum Chests Scavenged: $(stat_value diana_electrum_collected 0 none) ($(stat_value diana_electrum_collected_this_adventure 1 none) this adventure)

description.desc: 戴安娜可以帮助从首领战利品口袋收集最多 $(current_scavenge_cap diana_electrum_scavenger floor) 个额外的琥珀金宝箱。未达上限时，戴安娜有 $amount% 几率在每次首领掉落战利品袋子时收集 1 个琥珀金宝箱。该上限每天增加 $cap_increase_per_day。

conditions.desc: ^^收集的琥珀金宝箱：$(stat_value diana_electrum_collected 0 none)（本次冒险 $(stat_value diana_electrum_collected_this_adventure 1 none)）

tipText.original: Diana has a chance to discover Electrum Chests with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.
tipText.display: 戴安娜有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现琥珀金宝箱，上限随日期提升。

description.display: 别担心，我们会保护你的！

description.original: If we're going to save Hank, we have to work together!
description.display: 若想拯救汉克，我们就必须齐心协力！

description.original: We can make it! Come on!
They're no match for our speed!
description.display: 他们根本追不上我们的速度！

description.original: This is just like that time with the beholder.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Diana's Inspire specializations by $amount%

description.original: We've faced Tiamat - this is nothing!
description.display: 我们直面过提亚马特——这都不算事儿！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Diana's Inspire specializations by $amount%

description.original: Don't worry, Eric. What could go wrong?
description.display: 别担心，埃里克。会有什么问题呢？

description.original: See, I told you it would be fine!
I'm fast, but not fast enough...
description.display: 我的速度很快，但还不够快……

description.original: See this? It means I'm the fastest!
description.display: 看到了吗？这说明我是最快的！

description.original: Sure, Presto can do ACTUAL magic; but go ahead, pick a card.
description.display: 没错，普雷斯托会施展真正的魔术——去吧，挑一张牌出来。

description.original: I believe in myself! I believe in all of us!
description.display: 我相信我自己！我相信我们所有人！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Diana's Inspire specializations by $amount%

description.original: I lead with wisdom and grace.
description.display: I lead with wisdom and grace.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Diana was already a formidable gymnast when she and her friends were transported to the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. Diana wields her Javelin Staff with determination and courage, harnessing its potent magic to triumph over countless obstacles. The confidence of this outspoken athlete propels her friends forward in their quest to return home.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Diana’s flexible support ability lets you choose to buff Dexterous champions, young Champions, or Champions with low ability score totals. She also speeds up area transitions.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 和她的朋友们被传送到龙与地下城的神奇世界时，戴安娜已经是一名强大的体操运动员。戴安娜勇敢而坚定地挥舞着自己的标枪法杖，运用其强大的魔力战胜了无数的障碍。这位坦率的运动员的自信推动着朋友们走上归家之途。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 你可以选择戴安娜灵活的支援为灵巧勇士、年轻勇士或总技能分数较低的勇士提供增益。她还能加快区域过渡。
